title: Login Screen
desc: Mobile sign-in screen. Employees sign in with the same username and password used on the web app.

title: Home / Dashboard
desc: Landing tab after login: leave credit snapshot, quick status for Leave/Overtime/CTO/OBT, birthdays, work anniversaries, and attendance highlights.

title: Requests Hub
desc: Central hub linking to the four self-service request types: Leave, Overtime, CTO, and OBT.

title: Notifications
desc: Push/in-app notifications for approvals, rejections, and status updates on the employee’s requests.

title: Profile Hub
desc: Menu linking to the employee’s profile, attendance, weekly schedule, profile-change requests, and account settings.

title: My Account & Settings
desc: Account settings: contact/account info, appearance (system/light/dark), change password, and sign out.

title: My Employee Profile
desc: Read-only view of the employee’s personal, contact, and employment information on file with HR.

title: My Profile Requests
desc: Status list of profile-change requests the employee has submitted (approved, cancelled, pending).

title: Request a Profile Change
desc: Form for requesting an update to personal info, work experience, or education — changes require HR approval before taking effect.

title: My Leave Requests
desc: List of the employee’s filed leave requests with status (Approved, Cancelled, Pending) and a shortcut to Leave Credits.

title: File a Leave Request
desc: Form for filing a new leave request: leave type, date range, day-by-day time schedule, and reason.

title: Leave Credits
desc: Per leave-type balance for the current school year: allocated, used, and days remaining.

title: My Overtime Requests
desc: List of the employee’s filed overtime requests with date, time range, and approval status.

title: File an Overtime Request
desc: Form for filing overtime: date, time in/out, requested hours, and purpose.

title: My CTO Requests
desc: List of the employee’s Compensatory Time-Off (CTO) requests, pairing worked overtime with time off taken.

title: File a CTO Request
desc: Form for filing a CTO request: the overtime work rendered and the corresponding time off requested.

title: My OBT Requests
desc: List of the employee’s Official Business Travel (OBT) requests with destination, dates, and status.

title: File an OBT Request
desc: Form for filing official business travel: travel dates, destination, purpose, transportation, estimated expenses, and optional accompanying staff.

title: My Attendance
desc: Daily time-in/time-out logs for the employee over a selected date range.

title: My Weekly Schedule
desc: The employee’s assigned work days and hours for the current schedule period.

title: Leave Request Detail
desc: Detail view of a single leave request: dates, reason, and the approval trail (immediate head + HR).

title: Overtime Request Detail
desc: Detail view of a single overtime request: date, time range, hours, purpose, and approval trail.

title: CTO Request Detail
desc: Detail view of a single CTO request showing both the overtime worked and the time off taken.

title: OBT Request Detail
desc: Detail view of a single official business travel request: destination, dates, purpose, and approval trail.
